_comment: Alive Skill System configuration. Edit this file to customize paths and thresholds.

graph._comment: Knowledge-graph edge weighting for wiki_graphify. Every edge between two entity pages (skill ↔ agent ↔ mcp-server, any combination) is computed from three signals and combined as a weighted sum. Semantic similarity uses sentence embeddings (cfg.intake.embedding.backend) to compare entity descriptions — this catches context-level affinity that tags and slug tokens miss (e.g., a 'python-linter' MCP links to a 'code-reviewer' agent even when they share no explicit tags). Tag similarity counts explicit frontmatter tag overlaps. Slug-token similarity counts shared tokens from entity slugs (e.g., 'atlassian-admin' skill ↔ 'atlassian-cloud' MCP share the 'atlassian' token). Override any key in your user config (~/.claude/skill-system-config.json) — weights must sum to 1.0.

semantic._comment: Semantic edge construction. top_k caps per-node neighbors to keep edge count bounded; at N=13,000 nodes and top_k=20 that's ~260K semantic edges (pre-filter). min_cosine drops weak matches before they become edges — it must be strictly in (0, 1). At 0.80 default, only pairs whose embedding vectors agree on nearly all their mass survive, which prioritises precision over recall (fewer but very-high-confidence edges; think near-duplicate or same-domain entities). Lower the floor (e.g. 0.50) when you want broader context-level connectivity at the cost of noise.

tag_edges._comment: Tag edge construction. dense_tag_threshold skips over-broad tags shared by >N nodes (a tag on 1000 nodes would create 500k noise edges of weight 1). Use Infinity to disable. shared_tag_saturation is the number of overlapping tags at which tag_sim saturates to 1.0 — with saturation=5, two pages sharing 5+ tags contribute tag_sim=1.0; sharing 2 contributes 0.4.

token_edges._comment: Slug-token edge construction. Mirrors tag_edges but for the pseudo-tags synthesized from slug tokens. shared_token_saturation applies to how many slug tokens two pages must share before token_sim saturates to 1.0.

mcp_quality._comment: Phase 4 MCP scorer. Weights must sum to 1.0; signals are popularity, freshness, structural, graph, trust, runtime. Override per-key in your user config (~/.claude/skill-system-config.json).

backup._comment: Change-triggered snapshot config. Paths under top_files are relative to ~/.claude. Trees copy directories. memory_glob walks ~/.claude/projects/*/memory.

quality._comment: Post-install quality scorer. 'weights' applies to skills (telemetry-heavy — skills are auto-loaded and usage frequency is the strongest post-install signal). 'agent_weights' applies to agents (structure-heavy — agents are invoked deliberately and rarely, so telemetry is a weaker quality signal). Both must sum to 1.0 and contain exactly: telemetry, intake, graph, routing. Grade thresholds must satisfy 0 <= C <= B <= A <= 1. See src/skill_quality.py.

lifecycle._comment: Asymmetric lifecycle gates. Demotions happen automatically from a D-streak; archive requires the skill to sit in _demoted long enough; delete requires typed-slug confirmation. See src/ctx_lifecycle.py.

dashboard._comment: KPI dashboard rendering knobs. See src/kpi_dashboard.py.
